title: Calendar start day
excerpt: I know the program is called MONDAY :smile: , but can there be an option to change the calendar view to start on Sunday like most conventional calendars?

posts.author: Chaim (Chaim Friedman)
posts.cookedHtml: I know the program is called MONDAY , but can there be an option to change the calendar view to start on Sunday like most conventional calendars?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Chaim!

You can edit the calendar start date via the admin settings:
